description: Your Zotero library contains citation data with inconsistent page number formatting. Standardize the 'Pages' field for the following three papers to use a single hyphen ('-') instead of double hyphens ('--') or en-dashes ('–'): 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem' (Turing, 1936), 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon, 1948), and 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., 2016).
